TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DIM_CUSTOMER.customer_sk as customer_sk, DIM_CUSTOMER.age as age, DIM_CUSTOMER.customer_type as customer_type, DIM_CUSTOMER.city as city, DIM_CUSTOMER.region as region, DIM_CUSTOMER.bank_name as bank_name, DIM_CUSTOMER.branch_id as branch_id, DIM_CUSTOMER.start_date as start_date, DIM_CUSTOMER.end_date as end_date, DIM_CUSTOMER.customer_id as customer_id FROM DIM_CUSTOMER where end_date = '4000-12-31'

GROUP.DESCRIPTION: Path for the data when none of the group conditions are satisfied.
GROUP.NAME: DEFAULT1

GROUP.EXPRESSION: NOT ISNULL(LKP_customer_sk) AND ( customer_type <> LKP_customer_type OR city <> LKP_city OR region <> LKP_region OR bank_name <> LKP_bank_name OR branch_id <> LKP_branch_id OR age <> LKP_age )
GROUP.NAME: update

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Pre SQL
